candidate_definition_hints.text: jsfive is a library for reading (not writing) HDF5 files using pure javascript, such as in the browser. It is based on the [pyfive](https://github.com/jjhelmus/pyfive) pure-python implementation of an HDF5 reader.

candidate_glosses.text: jsfive is a library for reading (not writing) HDF5 files using pure javascript, such as in the browser. It is based on the [pyfive](https://github.com/jjhelmus/pyfive) pure-python implementation of an HDF5 reader.
